KAGUYA-SAKAYORI_IROHA.banter.alive.endTu: You Screw Up, I Don't Care
KAGUYA-SAKAYORI_IROHA.cardsModifierDescr: Iroha's cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
KAGUYA-SAKAYORI_IROHA.description:
A 17-year-old high school girl.
An honor student excelling in both academics and athletics at school, but in reality she needs to earn her own living and tuition fees.
Has musical experience and can compose, but gave it up for some reason.
KAGUYA-SAKAYORI_IROHA.eventDeathPreventi: How could it end like this……
KAGUYA-SAKAYORI_IROHA.title: Sakayori Iroha
KAGUYA-HINA_CHARACTER.title: Kaguya
KAGUYA-HINA_CHARACTER.description: A curious maiden who came from the moon, appearing from a seven-colored gaming console pole. Cheerful and fond of acting spoiled, sometimes a little willful. After meeting Iroha, she came to understand human emotions, love, and resistance. She once returned to the moon, but Iroha's singing made her resolve to come back to Earth.
KAGUYA-HINA_CHARACTER.cardsModifierDescr: Kaguya's cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
KAGUYA-HINA_CHARACTER.banter.dead.endTur: Iroha... I want to go home...
